global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with a game interface and promotional text.
global.main_message: Encouraging new players to join the game with rewards.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: GlitchWave logo
elements.description: A stylized logo with the text 'GlitchWave' in bold, modern font, set against a purple background.

elements.label: Game interface
elements.description: A screenshot of a game interface featuring four empty slots with circular indicators, set in a clean layout.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: A prominent headline text that reads 'Join the arena' in a large, bold font, centered at the top.

elements.label: Reward message
elements.description: A smaller text below the headline that states 'Free rewards for new players' in a clear, readable font.

elements.label: Arrow icon
elements.description: A simple right-facing arrow icon, indicating a forward action, placed at the top right corner.

elements.label: Watch now button
elements.description: A rectangular button with the text 'Watch now' in a bold font, located at the bottom center of the ad.

elements.label: Top left circle
elements.description: A small circular shape located at the top left, possibly indicating a game feature or option.

elements.label: Top right circle
elements.description: Another small circular shape located at the top right, similar to the left circle.

elements.label: Bottom left circle
elements.description: A small circular shape at the bottom left, adding to the visual interest of the ad.

elements.label: Main content area
elements.description: The central area of the ad that showcases the game interface and key messages.
elements.text_content: Join the arena Free rewards for new players

elements.label: GlitchWave title
elements.description: The title 'GlitchWave' prominently displayed at the top of the ad in a bold, eye-catching font.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A clear call-to-action button at the bottom of the ad encouraging viewers to engage.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main content area is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
